name: Bajaj Auto Pulsar 125
description: An entry-level sporty commuter offering premium Pulsar styling and fuel-efficient performance for city riding.

name: Bajaj Auto Pulsar 150
description: One of India's most iconic sporty commuters, known for its robust build, classic design, and reliable performance.

name: Bajaj Auto Pulsar 180
description: A legacy street fighter offering muscular aesthetics and a strong mid-range torque for daily enthusiasts.

name: Bajaj Auto Pulsar 220F
description: A cult favorite performance bike featuring a semi-faired design, projector headlamps, and high-speed stability.

name: Bajaj Auto Pulsar N125
description: A modern, aggressively styled urban street bike designed to target younger buyers with advanced electronics.

name: Bajaj Auto Pulsar N160
description: A next-generation naked street fighter boasting a highly refined engine and segment-first dual-channel ABS.

name: Bajaj Auto Pulsar N250
description: The naked quarter-litre flagship Pulsar, combining muscular street presence with a smooth, torque-rich engine.

name: Bajaj Auto Pulsar NS125
description: An aggressive, perimeter-frame naked bike scaled down to an affordable and efficient 125cc displacement.

name: Bajaj Auto Pulsar NS160
description: A sharp street-naked machine inspired by larger sports bikes, featuring a perimeter frame and oil-cooled engine.

name: Bajaj Auto Pulsar NS200
description: A high-revving, liquid-cooled naked sports bike featuring raw acceleration and exceptional track-like handling.

name: Bajaj Auto Pulsar NS400Z
description: The ultimate flagship Pulsar street fighter, bringing massive power, electronics, and value to the 400cc segment.

name: Bajaj Auto Pulsar RS200
description: The only fully faired race bike in the Pulsar lineup, equipped with dual projector lamps and track-tuned performance.

name: Bajaj Auto Dominar 250
description: A purpose-built sports touring bike designed to make long-distance cruising comfortable and accessible.

name: Bajaj Auto Dominar 400
description: A heavy-duty sports tourer packed with premium hardware, upside-down forks, and touring accessories as standard.

name: Bajaj Auto Avenger Street 160
description: A low-slung, blacked-out urban cruiser built for effortless handling and comfortable daily city commutes.

name: Bajaj Auto Avenger Street 220
description: An alloy-wheel cruiser bringing street-smart aesthetics mixed with relaxed ergonomic long-haul dynamics.

name: Bajaj Auto Avenger Cruise 220
description: A classic highway cruiser featuring abundant chrome detailing, a tall windshield, and a comfortable backrest.

name: Bajaj Auto Platina 100
description: A highly affordable mileage-oriented commuter featuring Comfortec suspension for absorbing rough roads.

name: Bajaj Auto Platina 110
description: An upgraded commuter motorcycle offering highway capability and segment-first anti-lock braking (ABS).

name: Bajaj Auto CT 100
description: A bare-bones, highly rugged commuter engineered for maximum fuel efficiency and low maintenance costs.

name: Bajaj Auto CT 110X
description: A tough, utility-focused variant of the CT lineup with crash guards, a rear carrier, and rugged tires.

name: Bajaj Auto CT 125X
description: A heavy-duty utility commuter delivering optimal load carrying capability paired with a larger 125cc engine.

name: Bajaj Auto Freedom 125
description: The world's first mass-production CNG-powered motorcycle, designed to drastically reduce urban running costs.

name: Bajaj Auto Chetak Premium
description: A premium electric scooter boasting an all-metal body, elegant neo-retro styling, and smartphone connectivity.

name: Bajaj Auto Chetak Urbane
description: A streamlined, everyday urban variant of the Chetak e-scooter prioritizing nimbleness and value.

name: Bajaj Auto Discover 110
description: A legacy commuter that combined premium execution, great suspension, and robust city efficiency.

name: Bajaj Auto Discover 125
description: A reliable commuter bike featuring digital instrumentation, disc brakes, and a peppier mid-range engine.

name: Bajaj Auto V15
description: A unique commuter built using metal from India's historic aircraft carrier INS Vikrant, styled as a solid neo-classic.

name: Bajaj Auto V12
description: A smaller, highly efficient 125cc execution of the iconic V platform retaining its unique solid metal feel.

name: Bajaj Auto Boxer 150
description: A global utility workhorse manufactured for extreme durability, heavy loads, and rugged international markets.

name: TVS Motor Apache RTR 160
description: A track-inspired naked street bike featuring a classic design language, sharp handling, and high-revving performance.

name: TVS Motor Apache RTR 160 4V
description: A class-leading 160cc streetfighter equipped with an advanced 4-valve engine and multiple urban riding modes.

name: TVS Motor Apache RTR 180
description: A nimble track-derived street bike appreciated for its superb power-to-weight ratio and sharp racing ergonomics.

name: TVS Motor Apache RTR 200 4V
description: A highly advanced naked machine featuring race-tuned slipper clutch, adjustable suspension, and smart navigation.

name: TVS Motor Apache RR 310
description: TVS's flagship fully faired supersport motorcycle, co-developed with BMW, built for both track days and touring.

name: TVS Motor Apache RTR 310
description: An aggressive, hyper-naked streetfighter loaded with cutting-edge tech like climate-controlled seats and cornering ABS.

name: TVS Motor Raider 125
description: A highly successful, futuristic 125cc commuter featuring mono-shock suspension and a rich TFT display.

name: TVS Motor Ronin 225
description: A modern-retro scrambler-cruiser crossover designed for unscripted, effortless journeys across town and trails.

name: TVS Motor Star City Plus
description: A premium entry-level commuter motorcycle offering an eco-thrust engine for dependable daily mileage.

name: TVS Motor Radeon
description: A sturdy, car-like retro styled commuter motorcycle built with a heavy-duty frame and high ground clearance.

name: TVS Motor Sport
description: An ultra-frugal entry commuter built purely to maximize economy and keep fleet maintenance simple.

name: TVS Motor Jupiter 110
description: One of India's best-selling family gearless scooters, loved for its metal body and comfortable ride layout.

name: TVS Motor Jupiter 125
description: An innovative 125cc scooter featuring a floorboard fuel-filler cap and class-leading massive under-seat storage.

name: TVS Motor Ntorq 125
description: A sporty, youth-focused automatic scooter delivering snappy acceleration and a throaty exhaust note.

name: TVS Motor Ntorq 125 Race XP
description: The highest performance variant of the Ntorq, pushing additional power and switchable dual ride modes.

name: TVS Motor Ntorq 125 XT
description: A high-tech version of the Ntorq featuring a dual-screen console, voice assistance, and social alerts.

name: TVS Motor Zest 110
description: A lightweight, zippy scooter targeted towards female riders looking for compact, agile urban transport.

name: TVS Motor Scooty Pep Plus
description: A highly recognizable, legendary lightweight scooter built for absolute beginners and easy tight-traffic filtering.

name: TVS Motor iQube Standard
description: A highly practical, quiet, and balanced family electric scooter mimicking conventional ICE scooter ergonomics.

name: TVS Motor iQube S
description: An upgraded electric scooter variant boasting enhanced user-interface options and customizable themes.

name: TVS Motor iQube ST
description: The flagship long-range iQube scooter variant with a significantly larger battery pack and faster charging.

name: TVS Motor X
description: A high-performance crossover maxi-electric scooter engineered with a rigid twin-spar frame and insane acceleration.

name: TVS Motor XL100 Heavy Duty
description: An indestructible, heavy-load carrying utility moped widely used by small businesses across rural and urban markets.

name: TVS Motor XL100 Comfort
description: A dual-seat version of the popular moped prioritizing comfortable passenger commutes over raw cargo space.

name: TVS Motor Victor 110
description: A legacy premium commuter that prioritized silent engine performance and heavily cushioned seating.

name: TVS Motor Wego 110
description: A dynamic family scooter notable for its low-vibration body balance tech and sturdy full-metal bodywork.

name: TVS Motor Centra
description: An older-generation commuter model celebrated for pioneering massive real-world fuel economy gains.

name: TVS Motor Fiero 150
description: A legendary early performance commuter motorcycle that paved the way for the future development of the Apache line.

name: TVS Motor Apache RTX 300
description: A conceptualized adventure tourer sharing the advanced liquid-cooled 310 platform for dual-purpose versatility.

name: TVS Motor Ntorq 150
description: An upscale, experimental maxi-scooter layout maximizing performance touring capabilities in an automatic format.

name: Royal Enfield Classic 350
description: The quintessential timeless retro cruiser featuring a smooth J-series engine and unmistakable vintage thumping exhaust.

name: Royal Enfield Classic 500
description: The iconic, high-torque legacy model representing heavy pushrod charm before the introduction of twin-cylinders.

name: Royal Enfield Classic 650
description: A majestic classic roadster scaling up the timeless retro aesthetic with a powerful twin-cylinder engine.

name: Royal Enfield Goan Classic 350
description: A relaxed bobber variant of the Classic 350 featuring whitewall tires, ape hangers, and a low seat height.

name: Royal Enfield Bullet 350
description: The longest continuous running motorcycle model in history, sporting hand-painted pinstripes and military legacy.

name: Royal Enfield Bullet 500
description: A heavy-duty incarnation of the Bullet line packing raw torque and simple, old-school mechanism prestige.

name: Royal Enfield Bullet Trials 350
description: A niche tribute variant with raised exhaust, custom single rack, and off-road tires honors mid-century trials events.

name: Royal Enfield Bullet Trials 500
description: A heavy-displacement trials build incorporating vintage competition aesthetics on a rugged frame setup.

name: Royal Enfield Meteor 350
description: An easy-riding, low-slung highway cruiser fitted with a counterbalanced smooth powerplant and standard navigation.

name: Royal Enfield Super Meteor 650
description: A premium cruising machine built with a solid steel chassis, USD forks, and an ultra-relaxed highway posture.

name: Royal Enfield Hunter 350
description: A compact, lightweight, and modern urban roadster tuned for quick handling through dense city environments.

name: Royal Enfield Himalayan 411
description: The primitive, unpretentious lifestyle ADV bike that conquered rugged terrains with simple long-travel suspension.

name: Royal Enfield Himalayan 450
description: A modern liquid-cooled, ride-by-wire powerhouse built to handle extreme dual-sport touring across high altitudes.

name: Royal Enfield Scram 411
description: An urban scrambler version of the original Himalayan, emphasizing multi-purpose agility and vibrant colors.

name: Royal Enfield Scram 440
description: An evolved, torquier scrambler built on an enhanced air-oil cooled single engine for dynamic road manners.

name: Royal Enfield Interceptor 650
description: A highly acclaimed authentic 1960s style twin-cylinder roadster delivering incredible performance and charm.

name: Royal Enfield Continental GT 650
description: A sharp retro cafe racer with clip-on handlebars, rear-set footpegs, and an aggressive road-carving profile.

name: Royal Enfield Continental GT 535
description: The classic single-cylinder cafe racer built on a lightweight Harris Performance frame layout.

name: Royal Enfield Shotgun 650
description: A modular custom-inspired machine that effortlessly transitions from a single-seater bobber to a dual-seat roadster.

name: Royal Enfield Guerrilla 450
description: An aggressive, fast naked roadster utilizing the modern liquid-cooled engine for high-energy urban riding.

name: Royal Enfield Bear 650
description: A rugged 650cc twin scrambler honoring historical desert racing feats with scrambler ergonomics and heavy tires.

name: Royal Enfield Thunderbird 350
description: A classic highway tourer featuring a massive teardrop fuel tank and premium projector headlamps.

name: Royal Enfield Thunderbird 500
description: The heavy-displacement variant of the Thunderbird family, equipped with electronic fuel injection.

name: Royal Enfield Thunderbird 350X
description: A youthful factory-custom cruiser variant with flat handlebars, bright colors, and tubeless alloy rims.

name: Royal Enfield Thunderbird 500X
description: An urban cruising machine blending dark theme accents with a powerful half-litre single engine output.

name: Royal Enfield Rumbler 350
description: The international branding export version of the comfortable long-range Thunderbird tourer series.

name: Royal Enfield Rumbler 500
description: An exported cruiser package optimizing high torque for global highway and urban touring conditions.

name: Royal Enfield Taurus
description: A rare historical collector's diesel-powered mass production bike legendary for unmatched structural fuel mileage.

name: Royal Enfield Flying Flea C6
description: An avant-garde electric motorcycle inspired by lightweight WWII military heritage bikes tailored for clean urban spaces.

name: Royal Enfield Machismo 500
description: A highly premium chrome-clad limited edition single engine masterpiece originating from historical tooling lines.
